prompt:
Lighting (Hollywood food ad level):
dramatic high-contrast lighting, strong warm orange rim light from flames, cool shadow fill for depth, sharp key light on face + burger, HDR highlights on bun + sauce + cheese, deep shadows (not flat), cinematic glow + light bloom

Dynamic elements (viral punch):
floating fire sparks, grease droplets, sauce splashes frozen mid-air, subtle motion blur on flames, energy-driven composition

Typography (bold + gritty street style):
“FLAME GRILLED ATTITUDE” — large bold distressed font, orange/yellow paint stroke background
doodle elements: arrows, crown sketch, “WHOPPER” circle mark
side notes: “YOUR WAY”, “SINCE 1954”, “SAUCE BOSS” (handwritten style)

Composition:
subject centered, burger slightly forward (depth effect), rule of thirds, layered poster composition, foreground + midground + background separation

Camera:
50–85mm lens, shallow depth of field f/1.8, ultra sharp focus on burger + face, cinematic framing, slight perspective push

Color grading:
ultra premium orange-black-red cinematic grade, fiery glow tones, high contrast, gritty luxury feel, subtle film grain

Style:
Burger King campaign + street poster + high-fashion editorial fusion, hyper realistic, 8K ultra HD, crisp textures, bold advertising aesthetic

--ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6 --q 2
